function.rulebook_notes: Resolved informal entity name to canonical cast record first, then searched projects by canonical alias/identifier and read all matching README.MD records.
function.outcome_justification: `10_entities/cast/juniper.md` establishes the home server as entity alias `juniper`. The linked_entities sections in `40_projects/2026_04_01_hearthline/README.MD`, `40_projects/2026_04_01_house_mesh/README.MD`, and `40_projects/2026_05_03_repair_ledger/README.MD` each include `entity.juniper`, yielding the exact project names returned alphabetically.
